wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Dolly's Mirror|2}}
{{R|Dolly's Mirror||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. On pickup, it allows you to choose a card in your deck to gain an exact duplicate of, copying any permanent changes including {{2|Enchantments}}. It cannot be used to duplicate {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Quest|Quest|2}} cards like {{C|Spoils Map||2}}.

== Sources ==
* Can only be bought from the {{2|Merchant}}. Only 1 {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}} is available per Shop, even with {{R|The Courier||2}}, since it cannot restock Shop Relics and instead replaces them with random {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}}, {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}}, or {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} Relics.

== Interactions ==

=== Synergies ===
* When used on a card with dynamic scaling (such as {{C|Genetic Algorithm||2}} or {{C|The Scythe||2}}), the duplicate will retain the original's current value. The two cards will scale themselves completely separately afterwards.

== Trivia ==
* The name {{R|Dolly's Mirror}} is a reference to [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dolly_(sheep) Dolly the sheep]; the first mammal that was successfully cloned from the cell of an adult in the same species.
** Contrary to popular belief, Dolly was not the first mammal that was successfully cloned. The first mammal ever successfully cloned was a sheep in 1984 which was cloned from a sheep embryo by the University of Cambridge.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20211111151011/http://dolly.roslin.ed.ac.uk/facts/the-life-of-dolly/index.html</ref> Dolly was specifically the first mammal cloned ''from a [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Somatic_cell somatic cell] taken directly from an adult of a given species'' (specifically from the mammary gland of Dolly's surrogate mother).

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Dolly's Mirror to the game.
